steps.title: Tie specificity to detail
steps.content: The conclusion says Hikwama's study provided more specificity in its data. The passage defines a higher detail rating as reported data with more detail, so the conclusion depends on Hikwama having a higher detail rating than Townsend.

steps.title: Use the direct challenge
steps.content: Choice A concerns traceability rather than data specificity. Choices C and D either support the conclusion or do not compare the two studies' detail ratings. A lower detail rating for Hikwama than for Townsend would directly contradict the specificity claim. The answer is B.
